## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New skill (adds a new efficiency skill)
- [ ] Skill improvement (enhances existing skill)
- [ ] Documentation (improves or adds docs)
- [ ] Beta testing report (real-world validation data)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

### For All PRs
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project's code style
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally

### For New Skills
- [ ] Skill uses the correct template format (YAML frontmatter + markdown)
- [ ] Instructions are clear and actionable for Claude
- [ ] Token savings are documented with before/after estimates
- [ ] At least 2 usage examples are provided
- [ ] Edge cases are handled (file not found, invalid input, etc.)

### For Bug Fixes
- [ ] I have described the bug being fixed
- [ ] I have added steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- [ ] The fix has been tested

### For Beta Testing Reports
- [ ] Report includes actual usage data (not estimates)
- [ ] Workflow type is specified
- [ ] Actual vs. claimed results are compared
- [ ] Screenshots or examples are included (if helpful)
